arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United Europa League final combined XI: Spurs dominate despite injury problems with only three Red Devils stars included
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's battle against Manchester United is one of the strangest Europa League finals ever with both side desperate for a trophy to end their miserable campaigns.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United - Europa League Final LIVE: Build-up, team news and updates as fans drink on the streets of Bilbao ahead of huge clash
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Tottenham and Manchester United meet in the 2024-25 Europa League final in the San Mames Stadium in Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Manchester United fans descend on Bilbao for Europa League final – live
arts.sum: All the latest news before the final, 8pm BST kick-off Jonathan Wilson: why this game matters | Email Tom To parade or not to parade? While Liverpool prepares to welcome up to a million people on to its streets this weekend for their Premier League title festivities, Gary Neville reckons Manchester United shouldn’t do anything similar if they win tonight, as PA Media reports. “If Manchester United win, they’ll celebrate a trophy but there will be a cautious celebration tomorrow – not by the fans, though, because they’ll obviously go crazy. Their interviews will be along the lines of them saying that they’re so happy and delighted for the fans, but it’s been a difficult season,” sniffed the former United full-back. “That will be the tone of it. I don’t think there should be a parade through the city for them winning the Europa League.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: €1.53b in market value - Spurs and Man Utd face off in most valuable Europa League final ever
arts.sum: On Wednesday night Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United will lock horns to see which club will be crowned champions of the Europa League for the 2024/25 season. While the trophy in itself is a...

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Tottenham legend makes bold Europa League final prediction
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham come into the Europa League final with poor defensive records and Teddy Sheringham thinks that will spell plenty of goals at both ends

arts.ttl: 'I've had enough': Joe Cole predicts who's going to win the Europa League - Tottenham or Man United
The Tottenham and Man United flaws that will decide a Europa League final of extremes
arts.sum: Contrasting club cultures, history and psychology are all set to clash in a fascinating - and unprecedented - Europa League final

arts.ttl: “We both deserve to win” – Tottenham star credits Manchester United for European run
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Manchester United in the Europa League final today and it’s a huge day in the club’s history. Spurs don’t just get a chance to win their first piece of silverware in 17 years, but it can also be their first European trophy since 1972. Tottenham star Destiny Udogie has never tasted silverware The post “We both deserve to win” – Tottenham star credits Manchester United for European run appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Tottenham fans brawl in Spain hours before Europa League final
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham will meet in the Europa League final on Wednesday night but rival sets of supporters clashed in ugly scenes less than 24 hours beforehand
